basics.name: Shamanth Kuthpadi Seethakantha
basics.summary: A student at the University of Massachusetts Amherst pursuing a Bachelors of Science degree in Computer Science.

work.name: University of Massachusetts Amherst
work.summary: Undergraduate Course Assistant for CS 198C. The job consists of providing support to students taking the course and directly collaborating with the instructors to make the course better.

work.name: University of Massachusetts Amherst
work.summary: Peer tutor at the Learning Resource Center at UMass Amherst. The job consists of assisting students with a variety of Computer Science courses.

volunteer.summary: Shadowed PhD research work in Approximate Nearest Neighbor(ANN) search algorithm, and in particular, worked on Milvus DiskANN

I volunteered in a nursing unit where I provided patients with basic needs such as water, food, bedding, and other such supplies. I also helped with clerical duties to file documents and restock inventory. Occasionally, I would tour patients' families around the hospital to show them the facilities.

projects.name: ESP32 WiFi Enabled Doorbell/Camera
projects.summary: Developed a WiFi enabled door camera that sends live footage via SMS when belled. Designed the 3D design (CAD) design to print mechanical parts of the product.

projects.name: SkoutaLab Chemistry Webapp
projects.summary: Worked in teams to develop functional web systems that enable students with the opportunity to learn chemistry in an interactive way.

projects.name: UMass Recreation Center Crowd Sensing
projects.summary: Developed an interactive webapp that analyzes voluntary crowd data from the university recreation center
